name: @lightining/general.ai
description: Production-ready TypeScript-first OpenAI orchestration wrapper with exact native passthrough and an agent runtime for prompts, protocol parsing, tools, subagents, safety, memory, and streaming.
author: Nixaut CodeLabs

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/copy-prompts.mjs
scripts.test:full: npm run build && bun run test.js
scripts.smoke: npm run build && node test/smoke/node-smoke.mjs && bun test/smoke/bun-smoke.mjs
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm test && npm run smoke && npm run pack:check
